mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of rate-cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and corporate earnings deterioration, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 6.0, invalidating the labor slack risk premium.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real short-term interest rates combined with accelerating retail sales indicate strong consumer demand outpacing monetary tightening, producing positive equity returns as earnings growth validates higher discount rates.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in greater than 60% of triggered cases or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals expanding corporate capacity utilization and margin improvement, generating positive short-term S&P 500 returns during post-recession recovery phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns in recovery regimes, with out-of-sample R-squared persistently below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect strengthening economic activity and rising corporate revenues, consistently predicting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Payroll growth shows zero predictive power for 20-day returns, with a rolling Rank IC persistently below 0.01 across all tested windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 225.0, accelerating inflation forces central banks to tighten policy expectations, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally in greater than 70% of periods following CPIAUCSL breaches above 225.0, invalidating the inflation-risk premium channel.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in housing starts and industrial production confirms synchronized demand and supply growth, reducing inventory bottlenecks and driving positive equity returns as earnings visibility improves.
failure_condition: The co-movement of HOUST and INDPRO yields negative forward returns in greater than 55% of cases or the interaction effect vanishes in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth deceleration below 1.5 percent signals economic stagnation and margin compression, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns during late-cycle expansions when growth expectations are already priced in.
failure_condition: GDP deceleration fails to predict negative returns, with forward returns remaining positive in greater than 60% of low-growth quarters.
